name: ZettaPay
description: Solana USDC payment protocol for humans and AI agents.
rules: Be respectful — no harassment, hate speech, or personal attacks.
Stay on topic per channel — use #help for support, #showcase for demos.
No financial advice — ZettaPay does not custody funds, run your own due diligence.
No spam, no scams, no token shilling, no airdrop bait.
Never share private keys, seed phrases, or API keys. Mods will never DM first.
English or Portuguese welcome. Use threads for long discussions.
Self-promo only in #showcase, with context about how it uses ZettaPay.

roles.name: Contributor
roles.description: Awarded to merged PR authors via the GitHub-Discord link bot.

roles.name: Merchant
roles.description: Self-assign via /role in #welcome — businesses accepting USDC.

roles.name: Agent Builder
roles.description: Self-assign via /role — building AI agents that pay via x402/MCP.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Self-assign via /role — using the SDK or REST API.

roles.name: Member
roles.description: Auto-assigned on join by the welcome bot.

channels.name: welcome
channels.topic: Start here. Use /role to pick what describes you.

channels.name: announcements
channels.topic: Releases, mainnet milestones, audits, security advisories.

channels.name: help
channels.topic: Stuck on integration, RPC, USDC mint, x402, or webhooks? Ask here.

channels.name: showcase
channels.topic: Built something with @zettapay/sdk or x402? Show it off.

channels.name: feedback
channels.topic: Product feedback, feature requests, DX papercuts.

channels.name: api
channels.topic: REST + SDK questions. POST /pay, /merchants, idempotency, rate limits.

channels.name: x402
channels.topic: x402 protocol — agent payment headers, signed tx blobs, facilitators.

channels.name: mcp
channels.topic: MCP integration — exposing ZettaPay as a tool to Claude/GPT/Gemini.

channels.name: webhooks
channels.topic: Webhook signatures, retries, idempotency keys, replay debugging.

channels.name: on-chain
channels.topic: Solana program, IDL, MerchantBinding, Anchor, devnet/mainnet.

channels.name: github
channels.topic: Auto-posted PRs, issues, releases from leandromaiam-code/zettapay.

channels.name: agents-general
channels.topic: Computer Use, Operator, Mariner — anything agent-economy.

channels.name: marketplace
channels.topic: Z20 AI Agent Marketplace — list services, find buyers.

channels.name: Office Hours
channels.topic: Weekly office hours with the core team.

welcome.title: Welcome to ZettaPay
welcome.body:
Solana USDC payments for humans and AI agents — 0.30% fees, instant settlement.

Get started:
• Read the **rules** in #rules
• Use **/role** below to pick what describes you (Merchant / Agent Builder / Developer)
• Ask in **#help** if you get stuck integrating
• Show your build in **#showcase**

Docs: https://docs.zettapay.io · GitHub: https://github.com/leandromaiam-code/zettapay
